title: Youth Community Service Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Youth Community Service Programs 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ANTFARM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides indoor and outdoor activities supporting healthy lifestyles for youth, as well as mentorship, counseling and support. Supports families and seniors in finding resources and problem-solving. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm Email (503) 668-7962 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with books, toys, household items, new hygiene products, knick-knacks, and clothing including interview or work-appropriate attire. Offers volunteer work experience and credit recovery for students working at the store. Also accepts donations of new and gently used items. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: June 16th-July 17th Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL BULLDOG BUBBLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry services through a work experience program for high school students. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Laundry: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-11:30am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays.
